name: Holidays
tagline: Look up historical and current public holidays worldwide
description: Retrieve public holidays and observances by country, year, month, or day, with optional search, language, and previous/upcoming holiday lookups.

auth.hint: Sign up at holidayapi.com for an API key and send it as the key query parameter.

tools.name: list_holidays
tools.description: List public holidays and observances for a country, optionally filtered by year, month, day, or search term.

params.name: country
params.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or alpha-3 country code; accepts up to 10 comma-separated values.

params.name: day
params.description: 1 or 2 digit day (1-31); must be used together with month.

params.name: search
params.description: Search holidays by name; minimum 5 characters.

params.name: language
params.description: ISO 639-1 language code (with documented exceptions) for holiday names.

params.name: format
params.description: Response format: csv, json, php, tsv, yaml, or xml; defaults to json.
